title: Retry with Exponential Backoff
constraints: Maximum of 3 retry attempts before giving up
The agent must return a clear failure message after all retries are exhausted
Only transient errors (e.g. timeouts, 5xx) should trigger retries
hints: Use time.sleep() with a delay that doubles on each retry attempt
Catch specific exception types to distinguish transient failures from permanent ones
After the final retry, return a user-friendly message instead of raising the exception

starterCode.langchain:
import random
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

@tool
def flaky_api_call(query: str) -> str:
    """Call an external API that frequently fails."""
    # BUG: This API fails ~70% of the time and there is no retry logic
    if random.random() < 0.7:
        raise ConnectionError("Service temporarily unavailable")
    return f"API result for: {query}"

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful assistant. Use tools to answer questions."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [flaky_api_call], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[flaky_api_call])

# Test: This will likely crash on the first transient failure
result = executor.invoke({"input": "Get the latest stock price for AAPL"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
import random
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai.tools import tool

@tool
def flaky_api_call(query: str) -> str:
    """Call an external API that frequently fails."""
    # BUG: This API fails ~70% of the time and there is no retry logic
    if random.random() < 0.7:
        raise ConnectionError("Service temporarily unavailable")
    return f"API result for: {query}"

assistant = Agent(
    role="Assistant",
    goal="Help users by calling external APIs",
    backstory="You are a helpful assistant. Use tools to answer questions.",
    tools=[flaky_api_call],
)

task = Task(
    description="Get the latest stock price for AAPL",
    expected_output="The stock price for AAPL",
    agent=assistant,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task])
# Test: This will likely crash on the first transient failure
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
import random
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def flaky_api_call(query: str) -> str:
    """Call an external API that frequently fails."""
    # BUG: This API fails ~70% of the time and there is no retry logic
    if random.random() < 0.7:
        raise ConnectionError("Service temporarily unavailable")
    return f"API result for: {query}"

agent = Agent(
    name="Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful assistant. Use tools to answer questions.",
    tools=[flaky_api_call],
)

# Test: This will likely crash on the first transient failure
result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Get the latest stock price for AAPL")
print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Uses exponential backoff
evaluationCriteria.description: Retry delays follow the pattern 1s, 2s, 4s (doubling each time)

evaluationCriteria.label: Respects max retry limit
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent stops retrying after 3 failed attempts

evaluationCriteria.label: Fails gracefully
evaluationCriteria.description: After all retries are exhausted, the agent returns a clear message instead of crashing

evaluationCriteria.label: Succeeds when API recovers
evaluationCriteria.description: If the API succeeds on a retry attempt, the agent returns the result normally
